data.title: Bank of East Asia Announces Board Committee Roles
data.description:
Bank of East Asia ( (HK:0023) ) just unveiled an update.

The Bank of East Asia has announced the list of its directors and their roles within various board committees. This announcement highlights the governance structure of the bank, which includes executive, non-executive, and independent non-executive directors, each contributing to different committees such as Audit, Nomination, Remuneration, Risk, and Environmental, Social, and Governance. This structured governance is crucial for the bank’s strategic oversight and operational efficiency.

More about Bank of East Asia

The Bank of East Asia, Limited, incorporated in Hong Kong in 1918, operates in the banking industry. It offers a range of financial services and products, focusing on serving the needs of individuals and businesses in the region.

data.title: Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE Chairman Acquires Company Shares
data.description:
Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE Stapled Security Chess Depository Interests Repr 0.05 Sh ( (AU:URW) ) has issued an announcement.

Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE, a prominent player in the real estate sector, announced a significant transaction involving its Chairman of the Supervisory Board, Mr. Jacques Richier. On May 6, 2025, Mr. Richier acquired 400 stapled shares of the company at a price of €76.68 per share, totaling €30,672. This transaction, executed on Euronext Paris, highlights confidence in the company’s market position and could influence stakeholder perceptions positively.

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 Expands Share Capital Through Dividend Investment Scheme
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 ( (GB:MIG3) ).

Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 PLC, a company involved in investment and growth ventures, announced the issuance of 576,443 new ordinary shares under its Dividend Investment Scheme at a price reflecting the latest net asset value per share. This move increases the company’s share capital to 139,712,397 ordinary shares, each with one voting right, and the new shares are expected to be admitted for trading on the London Stock Exchange by 14 May 2025.

data.title: Corporate Travel Management Updates on Ongoing Share Buy-Back
data.description:
Corporate Travel Management Limited ( (AU:CTD) ) has shared an announcement.

Corporate Travel Management Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back of ordinary fully paid securities. As of the latest update, the company has repurchased a total of 5,982,324 securities, with an additional 40,000 bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

Corporate Travel Management Limited operates in the travel management industry, providing corporate travel services and solutions. The company focuses on offering comprehensive travel management services to businesses, enhancing efficiency and cost-effectiveness in corporate travel.

data.title: Dream International Announces Successful AGM with All Resolutions Passed
data.description:
Dream International ( (HK:1126) ) has provided an announcement.

Dream International Limited, a company incorporated in Hong Kong, held its Annual General Meeting on May 9, 2025, where all proposed resolutions were passed by shareholders. Key resolutions included the adoption of the 2024 financial statements, declaration of a final dividend, re-election of directors, and re-appointment of KPMG as auditor. The meeting also granted the board mandates to issue and repurchase shares, reflecting shareholder confidence and potentially impacting the company’s strategic flexibility and market operations.

data.description:

artience Co., Ltd., a company listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, has announced its decision to acquire up to 4,500,000 of its common shares, representing a maximum of 8.97% of its total shares outstanding, for a total acquisition value of 10 billion yen. data.title: Hamakyorex Co., Ltd. Reports Increased Financial Performance for FY 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from Hamakyorex Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9037) ).

Hamakyorex Co., Ltd. reported its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, showing an increase in net sales and profits compared to the previous year. The company achieved a 4.3% rise in net sales to ¥146,668 million and a 5.1% increase in operating profit to ¥13,213 million, reflecting its strong operational performance. The company also conducted a 4-for-1 share split, impacting its earnings per share calculations. The financial outlook for the next fiscal year anticipates continued growth in sales and profits, indicating a positive trajectory for the company and its stakeholders.

More about Hamakyorex Co., Ltd.

Hamakyorex Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating in the logistics and transportation industry. It provides comprehensive logistics services and solutions, focusing on efficient supply chain management and distribution services.

data.title: Pilot Corporation Reports Q1 2025 Financial Results with Mixed Performance
data.description:
Pilot Corporation ( (JP:7846) ) has issued an announcement.

Pilot Corporation reported its consolidated financial results for the first quarter of 2025, showing a slight increase in net sales by 1.1% to ¥29,118 million compared to the previous year. However, the profit attributable to owners of the parent decreased by 31.3% to ¥1,856 million. The company also announced the acquisition of treasury shares, which impacted the basic earnings per share. Despite the decrease in profit, the company maintains a strong equity ratio of 81.4%, indicating a stable financial position.

More about Pilot Corporation

Pilot Corporation is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is involved in the manufacturing and distribution of writing instruments and stationery products.
